title: Python Text-Based Maze Game (AT1)
subject: Software Engineering
notes: Design, build & test a text-based maze game in Python using imperative programming. Requires: 8+ rooms, 5+ items, inventory (list), scoring, save/load (sequential files), 2+ extension features, full documentation (requirements, game map, pseudocode, structure chart, data dictionary), and a 2-3 min video. Submit zipped folder to Canvas (your_name_AT1). WEEKLY PLAN: Week 1 (Apr 3) - Plan theme, design room map & data dictionary. Week 2 (Apr 10) - Build rooms, items, inventory, scoring, save/load. Week 3 (Apr 17) - Add extensions, polish input handling, write documentation. Week 4 (Apr 24) - Test, record video, zip & submit to Canvas.
